project_type: Next.js 15 App Router website with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, GSAP animations
build_system: Next.js with npm scripts (next build, next lint)
test_framework: No test framework - verification via build + lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build (must compile all 11 pages). 2. Run npm run lint (must pass with zero errors). 3. Verify no broken image/video references in the output.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node.js 22 available. No test framework to run beyond lint.
contribution_requirements: All components use 'use client' directive for client components. GSAP cleanup via gsap.context(). Reduced motion support via prefers-reduced-motion. Accessibility: proper ARIA labels, focus traps on modals, skip-to-content link.
key_patterns: - Components in /components/ organized by section (Home/, Navigation/, Footer/, Services/, Contact/, ConsultationModal/). - lib/constants.ts for shared data (services list, company info, nav links). - lib/services-data.ts for detailed service page data. - lib/animations.ts for reusable animation utilities. - Tailwind v4 theme defined in @theme block in globals.css. - Custom CSS utility classes (text-editorial-xl, text-editorial-lg, text-editorial-md). - GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll animations. - Word reveal pattern used throughout (split text into spans, translateY). - MagneticButton for interactive hover effects. - ConsultationContext for global modal state.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages (page.tsx, layout.tsx, globals.css, services/[slug]/page.tsx, contact/page.tsx). components/ - React components organized by page section. lib/ - shared constants, service data, animation utilities. public/ - static assets (currently empty - no images/videos exist).
